member.name: T:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.DropdownsController
member.summary: Modern RESTful endpoints for master/dropdown data.

member.name: M:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.DropdownsController.Get(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch a dropdown category by name, optionally cascaded by parent code (e.g. /api/dropdowns/State?parentCode=IN).

member.name: M:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.Legacy.CommonDropdownController.Fetch(HMS.PatientRegistration.Application.DTOs.DropdownRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy dropdown fetch. Supports cascading via ParentCode.

member.name: T:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.Legacy.PatientRegistrationController
member.summary: Legacy-compatible endpoints that mirror the original ASP.NET WebForms/MVC API so existing callers can migrate without changing their request shape.

member.name: M:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.Legacy.PatientRegistrationController.Iud(HMS.PatientRegistration.Application.DTOs.PatientRegistrationRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy Insert/Update/Delete entry point. Saves a patient.

member.name: M:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.Legacy.PatientRegistrationController.FetchPatientData(HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.Legacy.PatientRegistrationController.FetchPatientDataRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Legacy single-record fetch by patient id.

member.name: T:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.Legacy.PatientRegistrationController.FetchPatientDataRequest
member.summary: Request body for the legacy FetchPatientData endpoint.

member.name: T:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.PatientsController
member.summary: Modern RESTful endpoints for patient registration.

member.name: M:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.PatientsController.Save(HMS.PatientRegistration.Application.DTOs.PatientRegistrationRequestDto,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Create a new patient or update an existing one when an id is supplied.

member.name: M:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Controllers.PatientsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Fetch a full patient record by id.

member.name: T:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Middleware.ExceptionHandlingMiddleware
member.summary: Converts unhandled exceptions into a consistent JSON payload so clients never receive raw stack traces.

member.name: T:HMS.PatientRegistration.Api.Middleware.RequestLoggingMiddleware
member.summary: Logs each request method, path and elapsed time at information level.
